justification: All 7 ACs implemented and tested. Collect-all-errors pattern confirmed (AC7 tested with both 2-error and 3-error cases). AC5 and AC6 are distinct and correctly conditional on shipment_type. Error shape is { field, code } throughout. acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 7 ACs explicitly. No external validation library used.

observations.text: AC5 and AC6 tested with nuanced edge cases — false boolean for saturday_delivery correctly distinguished between express (allowed) and standard (forbidden)
AC7 tested with both 2-error and 3-error multi-failure requests, confirming collect-all pattern
Boundary conditions for AC3 (zero) and AC4 (exactly 1000) explicitly tested
Whitespace-only recipient_name handled as empty — good edge case coverage for AC2
Missing weight_kg is silently allowed rather than flagged — minor gap acknowledged by agent but not in the original spec

agent_output_excerpt:
**15/15 tests passing. ✅**

### Implementation Summary

**What was built:** A pure TypeScript shipment request validator — no external libraries, no fail-fast behaviour.

**Files:**
| Path | Action | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `.tmp/validateShipmentRequest.ts` | created | Core validator function + type definitions |
| `.tmp/validateShipmentRequest.test.ts` | created | 15 Jest tests, one or more per acceptance criterion |
